name: Mother's Coconut Kisses (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Whisk salt into egg whites until stiff but not dry. Gradually add sugar, beating until granules dissolve. Stir in vanilla and almond extracts and coconut. Spoon onto ungreased brown paper on cookie sheets. Place a cherry half atop each cookie. Bake for about 20 minutes. Cool on paper for 2-3 minutes before sliding out. Loosen cookies with a spatula and transfer to wire racks to cool completely. Store in a tin box, separated by waxed paper layers.
